name: Jerusalem Artichoke Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the Jerusalem artichokes and cook in simmering water for 30-40 minutes, until tender.
2. Drain and discard the cooking liquid.
3. Peel and mash the artichokes and place them in a large saucepan.
4. Stir in the chicken broth and green onions.
5. Simmer for about 15 minutes; season to taste with salt and pepper.
6. Serve sprinkled with dill.
